rationale: Palette overlaps incidentally (cyan/magenta/yellow neons), but the anime-IP static splash with energy-blast hero is fundamentally off-brand for a minimalist top-down .io game — there's no way to honestly represent trail-drawing or territory capture through Goku key art. Audience also skews to mid-core anime/RPG fans (Dokkan players), not the broad casual snackable-arcade crowd Paper.io 2 monetizes. Do not adapt; if the team wants a "character hero" angle, build a custom mascot/skin showcase instead of borrowing this archetype.
